title: astragalus hermannii
intro: Astragalus hermannii, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus hermannii include reducing fatigue and improving physical performance, as well as protecting against respiratory infections, cardiovascular disease, and cancer. Astragalus hermannii is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to support overall well-being and longevity.
